description: A shared Python FastAPI caching proxy service that sits between Claude Code agents and the Slack Web API. Mirrors the Slack API faithfully (same paths, auth pass-through, same response format). Caches GET responses on disk using Stoolap, passes POST requests through with cache invalidation. Agents change one config value to use it. Auto-fallback to direct Slack calls if proxy unreachable. Deployed as systemd service.
